name: Feature
javadoc: /** * The Feature class encapsulates a bonus or penalty * that can be applied to any action within the game, most obviously * combat. */

members.name: copyFrom
members.javadoc: /** * Copy another Feature. * * @param other The other Feature to copy. */

tags.name: other
tags.description: the code must be a Feature

members.name: hasTimeLimit
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Does this feature have a time limit?
 *
 * @return True if the feature is time limited.
 */

tags.name: True
tags.content: if the feature is time limited.

members.name: getFirstTurn
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Get the first turn of a time limit.
 *
 * @return The first turn, or null if none.
 */

tags.name: The
tags.content: first turn, or null if none.

members.name: setFirstTurn
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Set the first turn of a time limit.
 *
 * @param newFirstTurn The new first turn value.
 */

tags.name: newFirstTurn
tags.assertion: assert args[0].getType().getQualifiedname() == null && args[0].getType().getSimpleName() == "Turn" && args[0].getType().is_array() == false && args[0].getType().array_dimensions == 0;
tags.description: The new first turn value must be of type Turn

members.name: getLastTurn
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Get the last turn of a time limit.
 *
 * @return The last turn, or null if none.
 */

tags.name: The
tags.content: last turn, or null if none.

members.name: setLastTurn
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Set the last turn of a time limit.
 *
 * @param newLastTurn The new last turn value.
 */

tags.name: newLastTurn
tags.description: The new last turn value must be of type Turn

members.name: hasScope
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Does this feature have a scope?
 *
 * @return True if there are any scopes attached to this feature.
 */

tags.name: True
tags.content: if there are any scopes attached to this feature.

members.name: getScopes
members.javadoc: /** * Get the scopes for this feature. * * @return A list of Scopes. */

members.name: setScopes
members.javadoc: /** * Set the scopes for this feature. * * @param scopes A list of new Scopes. */

members.name: addScope
members.javadoc: /** * Add a scope. * * @param scope The Scope to add. */

tags.name: scope
tags.description: The scope to add must be of type Scope

members.name: getSource
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Get the source of this feature.
 *
 * @return The source object.
 */

members.name: setSource
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Set the source of this feature.
 *
 * @param newSource The new source.
 */

tags.name: newSource
tags.description: The new source must be of type FreeColObject

members.name: getDuration
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Get the duration of this feature.
 *
 * @return The number of turns this feature lasts.
 */

tags.name: The
tags.content: number of turns this feature lasts.

members.name: setDuration
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Set the duration of this feature.
 *
 * @param newDuration The new duration.
 */

tags.name: newDuration
tags.description: The new duration must be an integer

members.name: isTemporary
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Is this a temporary feature?
 *
 * True if this is a temporary feature.
 */

members.name: setTemporary
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Set the temporary status.
 *
 * @param newTemporary The new temporary status.
 */

members.name: appliesTo
members.javadoc: /** * Does this feature apply to a given object type? * * @param objectType The FreeColGameObjectType to test. * @return True if there are no scopes, or at least one scope is * applicable to the object. */

tags.name: objectType
tags.description: the object type must be of type FreeColGameObjectType

tags.name: True
tags.content: if there are no scopes, or at least one scope is applicable to the object.

members.name: appliesTo
members.javadoc: /** * Does this feature apply to a given turn? * * @param turn The Turn to test. * @return True if the turn is null or not outside a valid time limit. */

tags.name: turn
tags.assertion: assert (args[0] != null && (getFirstTurn() == null || getDuration() < getCurrentTime())) || hasTimeLimit();
tags.description: The turn must not be null or outside a valid time limit

tags.name: True
tags.content: if the turn is null or not outside a valid time limit.

members.name: appliesTo
members.javadoc: /** * Does this feature apply to a given object type and turn. * * @param objectType The FreeColGameObjectType to test. * @param turn The Turn to test. * @return True if the feature applies. */

tags.name: objectType
tags.description: the code must be of type FreeColGameObjectType

tags.name: turn
tags.description: the code must be of type Turn

members.name: isOutOfDate
members.javadoc: /** * Is this feature out of date with respect to a given turn? * * @param turn The Turn to compare to. * @return True if the Feature has an lastTurn turn smaller than the * given turn. */

tags.name: turn
tags.description: The Feature has an lastTurn turn smaller than the given turn

tags.name: True
tags.content: if the Feature has an lastTurn turn smaller than the given turn.

members.name: isIndependent
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Is this feature an independent stand-alone one, or is it
 * derived from some other entity such as a founding father.  This
 * is important for player and colony serialization, where we do
 * *not* want to read or write derived features because they are
 * added to the player by the source.
 *
 * @return True if the feature is independent.
 */
